message:
Skip ABS race test without Azure sink operator (#6094)

## 🔍 Problem

The ABS finalize-close race test fails in environments where the
optional Azure Blob Storage plugin is unavailable because the Python
test reaches pipeline compilation and reports `to_azure_blob_storage` as
missing.

## 🛠️ Solution

Declare the sink operator as a suite capability requirement and opt into
capability-based skipping.

## 💬 Review

Focus on whether the suite-level requirement matches the optional ABS
plugin behavior.

Co-authored-by: Pi <pi@tenzir.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,10 @@
 suite: to-abs-finalize-close-race
 fixtures: [abs_slow_proxy]
+requires:
+  operators:
+    - to_azure_blob_storage
 timeout: 240
 skip:
   on:
     - fixture-unavailable
+    - capability-unavailable
